# Minimal dependencies for GitHub Actions pytest (prod/lgbm_prod.py with SKIP_MODEL_LOAD=true).
# Keep separate from requirements.txt to avoid pyspark/nannyml/optuna and long pip resolves.

httpx==0.27.2
